utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Can I ask you something ? Have you ever had a guy have a crush on you ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Is that why you wanted to tie my tie ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_Is that why you wanted to tie my tie ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: There is this kid in my class who said he is in love with me .

emotion_cause.span: 3_There is this kid in my class who said he is in love with me .
3_There is this kid in my class who said he is in love with me .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I do ... I do not have a boyfriend . There’s a guy in one of my classes who ... who has a crush on me .

emotion_cause.span: 7_There’s a guy in one of my classes who ... who has a crush on me .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I mean , last year Elizabeth now ... now this kid .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: What ... what ... what ... what is it ? !

emotion_cause.span: 13_Am I giving out some kind of ... sexy professor vibe ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Am I giving out some kind of ... sexy professor vibe ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_Am I giving out some kind of ... sexy professor vibe ?
13_Am I giving out some kind of ... sexy professor vibe ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: It ... it ... The point is my natural charisma has made him fail his midterm .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , see now I feel bad for the kid !

emotion_cause.span: 15_my natural charisma has made him fail his midterm .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I had a crush on a teacher once and it was so hard !

emotion_cause.span: 17_I had a crush on a teacher once and it was so hard !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You know you ... I could not concentrate and I blushed every time he looked at me .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I mean come on , you remember what it is like to be 19 and in love .
